title: 以至于 (yǐzhìyú) - So much so that
explanation: 以至于 introduces an extreme result or consequence of a preceding situation, meaning "so much so that" or "to the extent that."

examples.chinese: 他太忙了，以至于忘了吃饭。
examples.pinyin: Tā tài máng le, yǐzhìyú wàng le chī fàn.
examples.english: He was so busy that he forgot to eat.

examples.chinese: 污染严重，以至于河里的鱼都死了。
examples.pinyin: Wūrǎn yánzhòng, yǐzhìyú hé lǐ de yú dōu sǐ le.
examples.english: The pollution was so severe that all the fish in the river died.

title: 有鉴于此 (yǒu jiàn yú cǐ) - In view of this
explanation: 有鉴于此 is a formal expression meaning "in view of this" or "given these circumstances," used to introduce a conclusion or action based on prior reasoning.

examples.chinese: 近年来事故频发。有鉴于此，我们加强了安全管理。
examples.pinyin: Jìnnián lái shìgù pín fā. Yǒu jiàn yú cǐ, wǒmen jiāqiáng le ānquán guǎnlǐ.
examples.english: Accidents have been frequent in recent years. In view of this, we have strengthened safety management.

examples.chinese: 成本不断上升。有鉴于此，公司决定调整价格。
examples.pinyin: Chéngběn búduàn shàngshēng. Yǒu jiàn yú cǐ, gōngsī juédìng tiáozhěng jiàgé.
examples.english: Costs keep rising. In view of this, the company decided to adjust prices.

title: 归根结底 (guīgēnjiédǐ) - In the final analysis
explanation: 归根结底 means "in the final analysis" or "when all is said and done." It introduces the fundamental reason or conclusion.

examples.chinese: 归根结底，教育是最重要的投资。
examples.pinyin: Guīgēnjiédǐ, jiàoyù shì zuì zhòngyào de tóuzī.
examples.english: In the final analysis, education is the most important investment.

examples.chinese: 归根结底，问题出在管理上。
examples.pinyin: Guīgēnjiédǐ, wèntí chū zài guǎnlǐ shàng.
examples.english: Ultimately, the problem lies in management.

title: 迫不得已 (pòbùdéyǐ) - Have no alternative
explanation: 迫不得已 means one is forced by circumstances with absolutely no alternative. Stronger than 不得不.

examples.chinese: 他迫不得已才卖掉了房子。
examples.pinyin: Tā pòbùdéyǐ cái mài diào le fángzi.
examples.english: He had absolutely no choice but to sell the house.

examples.chinese: 迫不得已的情况下，我们只能推迟计划。
examples.pinyin: Pòbùdéyǐ de qíngkuàng xià, wǒmen zhǐ néng tuīchí jìhuà.
examples.english: Under unavoidable circumstances, we can only postpone the plan.

title: 出于 (chūyú) - Out of/Due to
explanation: 出于 means "out of" or "due to" and is used to state the reason or motive behind an action.

examples.chinese: 他出于好奇打开了那扇门。
examples.pinyin: Tā chūyú hàoqí dǎkāi le nà shàn mén.
examples.english: He opened that door out of curiosity.

examples.chinese: 出于安全考虑，这条路已经封闭。
examples.pinyin: Chūyú ānquán kǎolǜ, zhè tiáo lù yǐjīng fēngbì.
examples.english: Due to safety concerns, this road has been closed.

title: 鉴于 (jiànyú) - In light of/Given that
explanation: 鉴于 means "in light of" or "given that" and is used in formal contexts to state a reason before a decision or suggestion.

examples.chinese: 鉴于目前的情况，会议推迟到下周。
examples.pinyin: Jiànyú mùqián de qíngkuàng, huìyì tuīchí dào xià zhōu.
examples.english: Given the current situation, the meeting is postponed to next week.

examples.chinese: 鉴于他的表现，公司决定给他升职。
examples.pinyin: Jiànyú tā de biǎoxiàn, gōngsī juédìng gěi tā shēng zhí.
examples.english: In light of his performance, the company decided to promote him.

title: 就...而言 (jiù...éryán) - As far as...is concerned
explanation: 就...而言 means "as far as...is concerned" or "in terms of," used to limit the scope of a statement.

examples.chinese: 就质量而言，这个产品是最好的。
examples.pinyin: Jiù zhìliàng éryán, zhège chǎnpǐn shì zuì hǎo de.
examples.english: In terms of quality, this product is the best.

examples.chinese: 就目前而言，计划进展顺利。
examples.pinyin: Jiù mùqián éryán, jìhuà jìnzhǎn shùnlì.
examples.english: As far as the current situation goes, the plan is progressing smoothly.

title: 乃至 (nǎizhì) - And even/Up to
explanation: 乃至 means "and even" or "up to and including," indicating an escalation from A to B.

examples.chinese: 这件事影响了整个城市，乃至全国。
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì yǐngxiǎng le zhěnggè chéngshì, nǎizhì quánguó.
examples.english: This matter affected the entire city, and even the whole country.

examples.chinese: 他的研究影响了学术界，乃至社会各界。
examples.pinyin: Tā de yánjiū yǐngxiǎng le xuéshù jiè, nǎizhì shèhuì gè jiè.
examples.english: His research influenced academia, and even all sectors of society.

title: 以免 (yǐmiǎn) - In order to avoid/Lest
explanation: 以免 means "in order to avoid" or "so as not to." It introduces something one wants to prevent.

examples.chinese: 你早点出发，以免迟到。
examples.pinyin: Nǐ zǎo diǎn chūfā, yǐmiǎn chídào.
examples.english: Leave early so as not to be late.

examples.chinese: 请仔细检查，以免出错。
examples.pinyin: Qǐng zǐxì jiǎnchá, yǐmiǎn chū cuò.
examples.english: Please check carefully to avoid making mistakes.

title: 不可避免地 (bùkě bìmiǎn de) - Inevitably
explanation: 不可避免地 is an adverb meaning "inevitably" or "unavoidably," used in formal writing to indicate something cannot be prevented.

examples.chinese: 全球化不可避免地改变了人们的生活方式。
examples.pinyin: Quánqiúhuà bùkě bìmiǎn de gǎibiàn le rénmen de shēnghuó fāngshì.
examples.english: Globalization has inevitably changed people's way of life.

examples.chinese: 技术进步不可避免地带来了新的挑战。
examples.pinyin: Jìshù jìnbù bùkě bìmiǎn de dàilái le xīn de tiǎozhàn.
examples.english: Technological progress inevitably brings new challenges.
